# Pull request

## What changed?

<!-- One paragraph. What is now different in the repo? -->

## Why?

<!-- Motivation: which user does this help, which gap does it close? -->

## Type

- [ ] New content (blueprint / template / Skill / example / checklist)
- [ ] Documentation update / clarification
- [ ] Framework matrix or catalog update
- [ ] Bug / link / typo fix
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] One concept per PR (split if not)
- [ ] Walked [checklists/open_source_quality_checklist.md](../checklists/open_source_quality_checklist.md)
- [ ] Internal links resolve (preview rendered Markdown on GitHub)
- [ ] Updated [README.md](../README.md) navigation if structure changed
- [ ] Updated [llms.txt](../llms.txt) and [llms-full.txt](../llms-full.txt) if a major section was added
- [ ] Updated [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) if user-visible
- [ ] No secrets / API keys committed
- [ ] Examples (if any) tested locally
- [ ] If adding a Skill: walked [checklists/skill_quality_checklist.md](../checklists/skill_quality_checklist.md)
- [ ] If adding an MCP integration: walked [checklists/mcp_security_checklist.md](../checklists/mcp_security_checklist.md)
